meta.title: Products — BudMedia
meta.description: Pizza boxes, delivery bags and wrapping paper with your ad. Full-colour print, food-safe, EU-certified. See products and pricing.

products.name: Pizza box 32 cm
products.description: The most popular size. Fits standard pizzas. Full-colour digital print on all sides. E-flute corrugated board, food-contact approved.

placements.description: One side of the box. Visible during delivery and on the table.
The entire top. First thing the customer sees.

products.name: Pizza box 40 cm
products.description: For family pizzas and large sizes. Bigger ad surfaces. Same print and material quality as 32 cm.

placements.description: Larger side surface gives more room for your ad.

products.name: Delivery bag
products.description: Paper bag for takeaway and delivery. Fits boxes, sides and drinks. Full ad print on both sides.

placements.description: Both sides of the bag. Carried visibly from restaurant to door.

products.name: Wrapping paper
products.description: For wraps, sandwiches and other food items. Food-safe paper with ad print.

placements.description: Entire paper surface. Low per-unit cost at volume.

compliance.title: Materials and certifications
items: EU Regulation 1935/2004 for food contact materials
PFAS-free in accordance with Danish law
Registered with the Danish Veterinary and Food Administration
